requirements.text: Create a durable first-wave integration contract using the existing task packets, directive references, allowed paths, reports, and project-control system; it may include a collision matrix and interface map but must not become a new task ledger.

requirements.text: The contract must freeze, per task: exact task ID; exact base SHA; task dependencies; complete outputs; precise allowed paths; precise forbidden paths; owned interfaces and schema versions; read-only interfaces consumed from main; generated artifacts and their sole owner; database/migration ownership; environment-variable ownership; service/port ownership if applicable; test and harness responsibilities; exact producer-report path; acceptance evidence; explicit stop conditions; and the planned downstream integration task.
requirements.status_reason: captured; awaiting per-task independent verification at the reviewed identity

requirements.text: No first-wave producer may depend on an unmerged output from another first-wave producer; if producer B needs producer A's work they are sequential tasks and may not run simultaneously.

requirements.text: Beyond path separation, check semantic collisions: same API contract or schema ID; same DB table or migration sequence; same configuration variable; same generated output; same source-of-truth document; same package or lockfile; same deployment definition; same production entrypoint; provider/consumer version incompatibility; and treat different source paths that write the same generated file as an overlap.
requirements.status_reason: captured; awaiting per-task independent verification at the reviewed identity

requirements.text: A first-wave producer must not modify (unless explicitly assigned sole ownership): CLAUDE.md; .claude/**; .github/**; the directive registry or directive tooling; the project-control CLI, master ledger, shared gate code, or control tests; root dependency and lock files; shared deployment definitions such as root render.yaml; common production entrypoints; shared application startup/configuration files; shared generated artifacts; another task's report; another producer's migrations; another producer's schema or interface.
requirements.status_reason: captured; awaiting per-task independent verification at the reviewed identity

requirements.text: A producer may modify only its exact task packet's allowed paths and its one exact producer-report path.

requirements.text: Producer modules are implemented behind frozen interfaces; wiring multiple modules into shared production entrypoints belongs to a later, controller-contracted integration task after the providers have been merged.

requirements.text: If a producer discovers that a frozen interface must change, it must stop and submit a short interface-change request; it must not edit the shared contract.
